title: DigiSkills 3.0 Batch-04 — from a live Gmail thread

scenes.heading: DigiSkills 3.0
scenes.narration: Digi Skills three point oh, Batch four, is now open for enrollment.

scenes.heading: Four New Courses
scenes.narration: Four new courses this batch, including cloud computing, and A I with Python.

scenes.heading: Three Steps
scenes.narration: Register, complete your profile, then pick any two courses you like.

scenes.heading: Funded by Ignite
scenes.narration: It is completely free, funded by Ignite, and run by Virtual University.

scenes.heading: Seats are limited. Enroll now.
scenes.narration: Seats are limited, so log in and secure yours today.
